{{Quote|We bought a load of power converters and control modules from the Jawas. He decided to test out some of them in his speeder. He headed off into the wilderness an hour ago. I just got a call that he is stuck out there.|[[Cuan Talon]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TS" />}}
'''Janus''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:TS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> he was the warehouse manager of [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]]. At some point, he bought some stuff to the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] traders of [[Sand Crawler 345]]. During a transfer mission to get [[Power converter/Legends|power converters]], his [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] broke down in the desert. His boss [[Cuan Talon]] hired a spacer to rescue him but Janus was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a group of [[Desert Demons]].<ref name="SWG:TS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Janus was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Janus was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
